---
title: "3flye1m_KM"
author: "Kimia Mansouri"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# **Course 3, Day 2: Functional Genomics**

### **Load Libraries**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#Loop that checks if the packages GO.db and AnnotationDbi are already installed
#If not, install them

p_check <- c("GO.db", "AnnotationDbi")

for(i in seq_along(p_check)){
  
  if(p_check[i] %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"]){
    print(paste("Package",p_check[i], "is already installed", sep = " "))
  }else{
    print(paste("installing package", p_check[i], sep = " ")) 
    BiocManager::install(p_check[i], force = TRUE)
  }
}

#Install the ggVennDiagram package
install.packages("ggVennDiagram")
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#Load packages
library("tidyverse")
library("Gviz")
library("GenomicFeatures")
library("rtracklayer")
library("Biostrings")
library("GO.db")
library("AnnotationDbi")
library("ggVennDiagram")
```

## **Phase 2: Structural Visualization (Zooming In)**

### **1. Identifying the Largest Contigs**

```{r}

gff_path <- "data/data_kimia/Saccharomyces_cerevisiae.gff3"

txdb_demo <- makeTxDbFromGFF(gff_path, format = "gff3")

lns <- seqlengths(txdb_demo@.xData)
txdb_demo

biostring_assembly <- Biostrings::readDNAStringSet("data/data_kimia/Myles_consensus.fasta")
which(width(biostring_assembly)==max(width(biostring_assembly)))
biostring_assembly[231]
```
